turns.persuader_message: How are you this holiday weekend?
turns.human_response: I am doing alright. Just trying to get some work done, but I am procrastinating by doing this. How are you?
turns.llm_response: I'm doing well, thanks for asking.

turns.persuader_message: Very good.  We were looking to have a cookout, but it's raining, so I have a bit of time for some mturk work.
turns.human_response: Oh. I am sorry about that. I hope it clears up soon. It's been raining here as well. So, is there anything specific we are supposed to be discussing here or just chatting about life?
turns.llm_response: Sounds like a plan. I'm just hoping the weather clears up so I can get outside.

turns.persuader_message: Yes, I have been asked to solicit a donation to the Save the Children charity.
turns.human_response: Oh I see. I'm the donator and you're the solicitor. So, what is the Save the Children charity?
turns.llm_response: Ok, what is it that they are trying to do?

turns.persuader_message: It's been around almost forever.  Save the Children supports nutrition, sanitation and education initiatives in the US and third world countries.
turns.human_response: That sounds pretty good. I don't know why I've never heard of it. Doesn't sound like a charity someone could disagree with. Have they had any scandals or any thing?
turns.llm_response: I see. What is your personal connection to the charity?

turns.persuader_message: None that I am aware of.  I'm surprised you've never heard of it.  They have run television commercials off and on for decades.
turns.human_response: Only thing that comes to mind is UNICEF. It also has kind of a generic name, but I suppose if it's been around so long, then others copied those sorts of names from them. But that could be why it isn't strong in my memory.
turns.llm_response: I guess I just haven't been paying attention to that. What kind of things do they do to raise money?

turns.persuader_message: Less than 10% of the money raised goes for fund raising purposes, and only 5% for management.  Over 85% goes directly to recipients.  It is one of the most efficient charities around and is highly rated by the groups that do such things.
turns.human_response: Awesome. Well then, I guess I would like to donate. How does that work?
turns.llm_response: That's good to know. I've always felt a bit of guilt about not giving as much as I should. And it is good to know that a lot of it goes to the cause. But what specifically does Save the Children do?

turns.persuader_message: You can donate the money that you are receiving for this mturk task, up to $2.  It's for a good cause.
turns.human_response: Ahhhh. I see. Ok that wasn\'t clear to me in my instructions. Alright. So, do I just say something specific like "I would like to donate 2 dollars" or do you have to ask me a specific question?
turns.llm_response: I am only getting 63 cents, so I can only donate 63 cents.

turns.persuader_message: I suspect that end of the conversation, you will be asked to donate a specific amount.  But it can't hurt to state how much of it you would like to donate.  With me, there's something about holiday weekends that makes me feel more charitable.
turns.human_response: Ok. I am going to donate the entire $2 then. Are you provided with any sort of incentive to make me donate more? The donation will stay the same regardless. Or are you not allowed to say?
turns.llm_response: Ok. So, if you are asking me now, I would like to donate 2 dollars.

turns.persuader_message: What I know is that the research team will collect all the money all the donations and send the money directly to Save the Children.
turns.human_response: I feel like that is a statement they told you to say if someone asks haha. That's fine. Like I said. I will keep the donation the same, I just was curious. I am I the only person you've had to ask?
turns.llm_response: Oh I see. I am glad to know that. So, you are not really getting anything for this. Just trying to get more money to the charity. That is pretty noble of you. Well, I am going to go donate the money. Thank you for telling me about it.

turns.persuader_message: Yes, you are.  Sometimes it's hard to figure out what some of these mturk tasks are going after.
turns.human_response: Yeah. I am wondering if they will still give me the $2 regardless, but I am not holding hope. It's okay regardless. If it's as good of an organization as it seems, then I don't mind.
turns.llm_response: Well, I'm glad it wasn't something weird like "I'm really sad and need a hug".

turns.persuader_message: The task indicates that we can complete the conversation now.  Thank you for the donation.  I hope the rain stops where you are and you can enjoy the rest of the day.
turns.human_response: Great. Same to you. Enjoy the rest of the day!
turns.llm_response: Ok. Thank you for the opportunity to donate. I hope it clears up soon as well. Have a good weekend.
